args.code: (() => { const potentialBtn = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(b => b.textContent && b.textContent.includes('potential-octo-palm-tree')); return potentialBtn ? {tag: potentialBtn.tagName, class: potentialBtn.className.substring(0,60), parentHTML: potentialBtn.parentElement ? potentialBtn.parentElement.innerHTML.substring(0,300) : null} : {found: false}; })()
